events.title: Who's Who: AI Edition
events.description: AI Portraits & One-Liners — Each member crafts prompts and generates AI images for colleagues. Fun kickoff to the initiative.
events.seminarTopic: What is Generative AI and Why Should Engineers Care?
events.skills: Prompt engineering basics, image generation, iterative prompting

events.title: AI Storyteller: The EngSys Chronicles
events.description: Teams of 4 create illustrated AI stories from fictional EngSys scenarios. Comic-strip style with AI-generated narration and images.
events.seminarTopic: History & Evolution of AI — From Turing to Transformers
events.skills: Multi-turn prompting, chaining prompts, collaborative AI use, visual storytelling

events.title: Prompt Battle Arena
events.description: Live prompt engineering tournament with Speed Round, Refinement Round, Domain Challenge, and Bonus Round.
events.seminarTopic: Prompt Engineering Deep Dive — Techniques, Patterns & Anti-Patterns
events.skills: Advanced prompt engineering — personas, system instructions, few-shot, chain-of-thought

events.title: My AI Assistant: Copilot Power User
events.description: Each member picks a recurring work task and uses M365 Copilot to automate or accelerate it. 3-minute live demos.
events.seminarTopic: M365 Copilot — What It Can Actually Do for Engineers
events.skills: Practical AI tool integration, measuring AI ROI, M365 Copilot deep dive

events.title: Code with AI
events.description: Domain-specific coding tasks using AI. Annotate correct, incorrect, and hallucinated code. Share final working versions.
events.seminarTopic: AI-Assisted Coding — GitHub Copilot, SiemensGPT, Best Practices
events.skills: AI-assisted coding, code review discipline, understanding hallucinations

events.title: AI Knowledge Base: Smart Documentation
events.description: Build a prototype AI-powered Q&A system over team documentation. Each person tests with domain-specific questions.
events.seminarTopic: RAG — How AI Can Search and Summarize Your Own Documents
events.skills: RAG fundamentals, document preparation for AI, enterprise AI assistants
events.comments: Mid-Year Check-In: Share leaderboard summary with manager.

events.title: Automate the Boring Stuff
events.description: Identify and prototype an AI automation for 1 repetitive daily task. 5-minute presentations with demos.
events.seminarTopic: Agentic AI — What Are AI Agents vs. Simple Chatbots
events.skills: Identifying automation opportunities, AI solution design, basic agentic thinking

events.title: AI Agents Hackathon
events.description: Team hackathon with complex multi-step engineering scenarios. Design agent architectures and implement key steps.
events.seminarTopic: Building AI Agents — Tools, Frameworks, and Patterns
events.skills: Multi-step AI reasoning, agent design patterns, tool orchestration

events.title: AI + Data: Data Detective
events.description: Analyze domain-specific datasets using AI. Ask natural-language questions, generate visualizations, identify anomalies.
events.seminarTopic: AI for Data Analysis — LLMs for Querying, Summarizing & Visualizing Data
events.skills: AI-powered data analysis, natural language querying, data visualization

events.title: My AI Use Case: Problem Definition
events.description: Capstone kickoff — each person identifies 1 real business use case. Submit 1-page proposals. 3-minute pitches.
events.seminarTopic: AI in Industrial Engineering — Real-World Case Studies
events.skills: Business problem framing, AI solution design, stakeholder communication
events.comments: Buddy pairs assigned for peer support over next 3 months.

events.title: My AI Use Case: Build & Iterate
events.description: Progress review — working prototypes, demos, round-robin peer reviews, office hours for hands-on help.
events.seminarTopic: Responsible AI — Ethics, Bias, Compliance & Siemens Principles
events.skills: Iterative development, peer review, responsible AI considerations

events.title: AI CatalyESt Showcase: Grand Finale
events.description: Final use case presentations to team and leadership. Judging panel scores. Annual leaderboard finale with prizes.
events.seminarTopic: Our AI Journey: 12 Months of Growth (Retrospective)
events.skills: End-to-end AI value demonstration, presentation skills
events.comments: Extended session 2.5–3 hours. Star Points awarded to Top 3 annual performers.
